topic: Cell A cobot C50 safety fault

messages.text: cobot dropped to a protective stop with C50
C50 is in the safety system range - a safety-rated signal tripped. check the safety I/O: e-stop loop, safeguard/light curtain, and the door interlock on the cell
the cell guard door was cracked open by the pallet
that's your safeguard stop. close and latch the door, acknowledge the safeguard reset, then clear the protective stop per SOP-2201. don't defeat the interlock
closed the door, reset safeguard, cleared, running again
